response.justification: Bogdan has impressive and highly relevant long-term experience in the geospatial domain through his personal project, GISCollective, and has experience with low-latency distributed systems. However, he critically lacks the required modern C++ or Rust experience, which is a primary technology for this role. His professional C++ experience is over two decades old, and his primary systems language appears to be Dlang. While his skills may be transferable, this significant gap in the core technology stack makes him a high-risk candidate who would require substantial ramp-up time.
strengths: Extensive experience building and maintaining a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven ability to build low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems.
Demonstrates passion for software craftsmanship and knowledge sharing through open-source work.
concerns: No modern C++ or Rust experience listed; professional C++ experience is more than 20 years old.
Geospatial experience seems focused on data collection and general GIS, not specifically routing or tiling pipelines.
The profile is that of a polyglot generalist, while the role requires deep specialization in C++.
